title: Graphic Design - Week 1 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 1 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master design theory, layouts, and typography.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Contrast, Alignment, Proximity
  • Typography hierarchies
  • Color wheel mechanics.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Branding Layout Design Mockups

Create a brand identity visual style guide using clean alignments and hierarchy rules.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • High-res PDF brand guidelines deck.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Solid understanding of visual balance and guidelines.

title: Graphic Design - Week 2 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 2 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master vector graphic creation in Adobe Illustrator.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Illustrator Pen tool
  • path selections
  • shape builders
  • vector anchors.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Vector Icon Set Design

Create a collection of custom vector icons styled consistently.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Vector .AI files and exported PNG files.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to design clean vector paths and icons.

title: Graphic Design - Week 3 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 3 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master logo design and typography.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Logotype styling
  • Kerning & tracking
  • vector logo alignments.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Company Logo Deck Design

Design a typography-focused company logo with alternate variations.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Logo deck showing mockups on actual assets.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Understanding logo geometry and visual weights.

title: Graphic Design - Week 4 Curriculum
description:

Project Task: Corporate Identity Package

  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

title: Graphic Design - Week 5 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 5 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master Photoshop image composing and retouching.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Layer masking
  • color grading
  • photo compositions
  • clipping paths.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Creative Product Poster

Blend multiple source images into a single creative product ad poster.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Layered Photoshop PSD file and output poster.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Proficiency in photo manipulation and compositing.

description:
Objective

Design Facebook/Instagram ad layouts matching visual brand themes.

title: Graphic Design - Week 7 Curriculum
description:

The objective of Week 7 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to learn vector illustrations.

Practical Implementation

title: Graphic Design - Week 8 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 8 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to learn basic UI/UX wireframing.

2. Detailed Concepts

Practical Implementation

Project Task: App Landing Layout Wireframes

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')

  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Understanding interface hierarchies and user experience mapping.
